reviews.comment:
Excelente atención!!! Paso 5 o 6 veces por año por Taco Pozo y siempre la mejor atención a pesar del calor que hace en verano.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!!! I go to Taco Pozo 5 or 6 times a year and they always provide the best service despite the summer heat.

reviews.comment:
A mi me encanto vivir alli. Estrane la gente muy buenos amigos....hermosos recuerdos  muy hermoso todo tranquilo. Llevo recordando esos caminos larguisimo nunca terminabamos de llegar al pueblo tan inolvidable. Ojala pudiera algun dia llegarme de vuelta .alli para mi son mi gente , mi familia mi todo. Los amo ,  los llevo conmigo.a ese pueblo .deapokito va creciendo .

(Translated by Google)
I loved living there. I miss the people, such good friends... beautiful memories, everything was so peaceful. I keep remembering those incredibly long roads; we never seemed to reach that unforgettable town. I wish I could go back someday. They are my people, my family, my everything. I love them, I carry them with me. That town is slowly but surely growing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRczUzMVRnEAE
